description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Kazoo Awesome Testing that runs on push to master and release/* branches and on pull requests to those branches. The workflow has two jobs: validate and test. The validate job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, handles pip cache, installs dependencies, and runs code checks with tox. The test job depends on validate, runs on multiple Python and ZK versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, handles caches, installs dependencies, tests with tox, and publishes a Codecov report.
